member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.Activation.Interfaces.IActivationQueue
member.summary: Durable queue for activation requests. Messages survive container restarts.

member.name: P:RealEstateStar.Domain.Activation.Interfaces.IActivationQueue.QueueDepth
member.summary: Returns the approximate number of messages currently in the queue. For Azure Queue Storage this is eventually consistent; for in-memory it is exact.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.Activation.Interfaces.QueueMessage`1
member.summary: Wraps a dequeued message with the metadata needed to complete/delete it.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Domain.Activation.Interfaces.QueueMessage`1.#ctor(`0,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Wraps a dequeued message with the metadata needed to complete/delete it.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Domain.Activation.Interfaces.IAgentConfigService.GenerateAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,RealEstateStar.Domain.Activation.Models.ActivationOutputs,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Generates account.json and content.json from gathered activation data. Does NOT overwrite existing configs.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Domain.Activation.Interfaces.IBrandMergeService.MergeAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Merges new brand signals with existing Brand Profile and Brand Voice. For the first agent in an account, creates a new profile (no merge needed). Returns the merged Brand Profile markdown and Brand Voice markdown.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Domain.Activation.Interfaces.IWelcomeNotificationService.SendAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,RealEstateStar.Domain.Activation.Models.ActivationOutputs,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends a personalized welcome message to the agent via WhatsApp or email fallback. Idempotent — does not re-send if already sent (tracked via WelcomeSent flag).

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.Activation.Models.ActivationOutputs
member.summary: All computed outputs from the activation pipeline, used to populate agent config files and send the welcome notification.

member.name: P:RealEstateStar.Domain.Activation.Models.ActivationOutputs.BrandExtractionSignals
member.summary: Raw brand extraction signals (intermediate output, not persisted as a skill file).

member.name: P:RealEstateStar.Domain.Activation.Models.ActivationOutputs.BrandVoiceSignals
member.summary: Raw brand voice signals (intermediate output, merged into Brand Voice.md by BrandMergeActivity).

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Domain.Cma.Interfaces.ICmaNotifier.NotifySellerAsync(System.String,RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Models.Lead,System.String,RealEstateStar.Domain.Cma.Models.CmaAnalysis,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends the CMA report to the seller and stores the communication in Google Drive.
Generates a CMA PDF report and returns the path to the temp file.
member.param: Comparable sales used in the analysis.
Agent account config (branding, contact info, etc.).
Brokerage logo image bytes, or null if unavailable.
Agent headshot image bytes, or null if unavailable.
member.returns: Path to the generated temp PDF file.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.Cma.Models.CmaResult
member.summary: Output of the CMA pipeline — everything needed to store and notify.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Domain.HomeSearch.Interfaces.IHomeSearchNotifier.NotifyBuyerAsync(System.String,RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Models.Lead,System.Collections.Generic.List{RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Models.Listing},System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends curated listings to the buyer and stores the communication in Google Drive.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Interfaces.ILeadOrchestrationQueue
member.summary: Durable queue for lead orchestration requests. Messages survive container restarts.

member.name: P:RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Interfaces.ILeadOrchestrationQueue.QueueDepth
member.summary: Returns the approximate number of messages currently in the queue. For Azure Queue Storage this is eventually consistent; for in-memory it is exact.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Interfaces.LeadOrchestrationMessage
member.summary: Serializable lead orchestration message for durable queue storage. Contains the essential data needed to process a lead, not the full Lead object.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Interfaces.LeadOrchestrationMessage.#ctor(System.String,System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Serializable lead orchestration message for durable queue storage. Contains the essential data needed to process a lead, not the full Lead object.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Models.AgentNotificationConfig
member.summary: Subset of agent account.json + content.json passed in dispatch payloads. Sized to stay under 64KB for future Azure Queue compatibility.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Models.CommunicationRecord
member.summary: Tracks a communication (email draft, WhatsApp message) through the pipeline. Used for dedup: same ContentHash + Sent = skip on retry. Persisted to the lead's storage folder by the PersistActivity.

member.name: P:RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Models.CommunicationRecord.Channel
member.summary: "email", "whatsapp", "email-fallback"

member.name: P:RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Models.CommunicationRecord.ContentHash
member.summary: SHA256 of draft inputs — dedup key. Same hash = same content, skip re-draft.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Models.LeadPipelineContext
member.summary: Mutable context passed through all pipeline activities for a single lead. Each activity reads what it needs and writes its output back. This is the single source of truth — no passing large objects between activities.
member.remarks: NOT thread-safe. All writes must happen sequentially from the orchestrator after parallel activities have completed (post-WhenAll).

member.name: P:RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Models.LeadPipelineContext.AgentContext
member.summary: Agent activation context loaded at the start of the pipeline. Null when the agent has not yet completed activation (backward compatible — falls back to generic behavior).

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Models.LeadPipelineContext.ToResult
member.summary: Build the final pipeline result from accumulated context.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Models.LeadPipelineResult
member.summary: Final result returned by the orchestrator.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Models.LeadPipelineResult.#ctor(System.String,System.Boolean,RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Models.LeadScore,RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Models.CmaWorkerResult,RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Models.HomeSearchWorkerResult,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Final result returned by the orchestrator.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Models.LeadRetryState
member.summary: Tracks completed pipeline steps with content-aware keys. Used by the orchestrator to skip already-completed work on retry.

member.name: P:RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Models.LeadRetryState.CompletedActivityKeys
member.summary: Key: activity name ("cma", "homeSearch", "pdf", "draftLeadEmail", "draftAgentNotification") Value: SHA256 hash of the input that produced the completed result

member.name: P:RealEstateStar.Domain.Leads.Models.LeadRetryState.CompletedResultPaths
member.summary: Key: activity name Value: storage path or serialized result reference

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.Onboarding.Interfaces.IDnsResolver
member.summary: Abstracts DNS resolution to allow testing of DNS rebinding prevention.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.Onboarding.Interfaces.SystemDnsResolver
member.summary: Production DNS resolver using System.Net.Dns. Excluded from coverage: thin wrapper with no branching logic.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.Privacy.Interfaces.IComplianceFileStorageProvider
member.summary: Marker interface for service-account-backed file storage (agent cannot access).

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.ContentHash
member.summary: Utility for computing content-addressed SHA256 hashes from activity input fields. Used by the orchestrator to determine whether an activity's inputs have changed since the last run, enabling safe skip-on-retry behavior.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.ContentHash.Compute(System.String[])
member.summary: Computes a deterministic SHA256 hash of the given fields joined with "|". Null fields are treated as empty strings. Field order matters.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Diagnostics.IDiagnosticsProvider
member.summary: Implemented by each worker project to expose its metrics for the /diagnostics endpoint.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.External.IGDriveClient.ListAllFilesAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: List all files in the agent's Drive (across all folders).

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.External.IGDriveClient.GetFileContentAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Download raw text content of a file by its Drive file ID.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.External.IGDriveClient.GetOrCreateFolderAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Find or create a top-level folder by name. Returns the folder ID.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.External.IGDriveClient.DownloadBinaryAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Download raw binary content of a file by its Drive file ID. Returns null if the token is missing or the download fails.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.External.IGDriveClient.CopyFileAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Copy a file to a destination folder and optionally rename it. Returns the new file ID.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.External.DriveFileInfo
member.summary: Lightweight metadata returned from listing Drive files.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.External.DriveFileInfo.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Lightweight metadata returned from listing Drive files.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.IContentCache
member.summary: Cross-lead content-addressed cache. Prevents re-running expensive activities (CMA, HomeSearch) when 100 different leads submit for the same property. Keys are SHA256 hashes of activity inputs computed by .

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.IContentCache.GetAsync``1(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns the cached value for , or null on cache miss.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.IContentCache.SetAsync``1(System.String,``0,System.TimeSpan,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Stores under with the given TTL.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.IDistributedContentCache
member.summary: Distributed content cache backed by persistent storage (e.g., Azure Table Storage). Cross-function dedup for CMA and HomeSearch results. Same contract as but survives across process restarts.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.IIdempotencyStore
M:RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.IIdempotencyStore.HasCompletedAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns true if the step has already completed successfully.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.IIdempotencyStore.MarkCompletedAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Marks the step as completed. Idempotent — safe to call multiple times.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.Storage.IFileStorageProvider
member.summary: Combined storage interface extending both document and sheet capabilities. New code should depend on IDocumentStorageProvider or ISheetStorageProvider depending on which capability is needed. IFileStorageProvider remains for backward compatibility with existing implementations.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Interfaces.Storage.IFileStorageProviderFactory
member.summary: Creates per-agent IFileStorageProvider instances with the correct accountId/agentId context for Drive writes. Used by activation persist activities that need to write to the agent's Google Drive, not the platform-level singleton.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Models.AccountConfig
member.summary: Maps to config/accounts/{handle}/account.json

member.name: P:RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Models.OAuthCredential.AccountId
member.summary: Account partition ID. Null during in-session onboarding; populated when stored durably.

member.name: P:RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Models.OAuthCredential.AgentId
member.summary: Agent identifier. Null during in-session onboarding; populated when stored durably.

member.name: P:RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.Models.OAuthCredential.ETag
member.summary: Azure Table ETag for optimistic concurrency. Populated by ITokenStore on read.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.NullIdempotencyStore
member.summary: No-op idempotency store — never reports a step as completed. Used in development and testing where replay protection is not needed.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.Shared.SupportedMarkets
member.summary: Go-to-market states where Real Estate Star is licensed to operate. Used for: timezone resolution, compliance forms, state-specific contracts, and validation of new agent onboarding.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.WhatsApp.Interfaces.IConversationHandler
member.summary: Classifies intent and generates responses for inbound WhatsApp messages. Implementation in Phase 3 (Task 11).

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Domain.WhatsApp.Interfaces.IConversationLogger.LogMessagesAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.ValueTuple{System.DateTime,System.String,System.String,System.String}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Appends a batch of WhatsApp messages as markdown to the appropriate Drive folder. If leadName is provided, messages are written to the per-lead folder; otherwise they go to the general WhatsApp conversation log. Drive write failures are logged as [WA-011] warnings and do NOT propagate.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.WhatsApp.Interfaces.IIntentClassifier
member.summary: Classifies the intent and scope of an inbound WhatsApp message. Production implementation calls Claude Haiku (fast, cheap).

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.WhatsApp.Interfaces.IntentClassification
member.summary: Result of a two-stage intent classification: intent type, whether the message is in-scope for the assistant, and (if out-of-scope) which deflection category applies.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Domain.WhatsApp.Interfaces.IntentClassification.#ctor(RealEstateStar.Domain.WhatsApp.Models.IntentType,System.Boolean,RealEstateStar.Domain.WhatsApp.Models.OutOfScopeCategory)
member.summary: Result of a two-stage intent classification: intent type, whether the message is in-scope for the assistant, and (if out-of-scope) which deflection category applies.

member.name: T:RealEstateStar.Domain.WhatsApp.Interfaces.IResponseGenerator
member.summary: Generates a contextual response for in-scope lead questions and action requests. Production implementation calls Claude Sonnet (quality responses).

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Domain.WhatsApp.Interfaces.IWhatsAppNotifier.NotifyAsync(System.String,RealEstateStar.Domain.WhatsApp.Models.NotificationType,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sends an outbound notification to the agent's WhatsApp number. Checks opt-in status and notification preferences before sending. DataDeletion bypasses preferences and is always sent. Logs [WA-014] on WhatsAppNotRegisteredException and [WA-015] on other errors — never throws.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Domain.WhatsApp.Interfaces.IWhatsAppNotifier.RecordAgentMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Marks the 24-hour conversation window as open for the given agent phone number. Called by WebhookProcessorWorker whenever the agent sends a message.

member.name: M:RealEstateStar.Domain.WhatsApp.Interfaces.IWhatsAppNotifier.IsWindowOpen(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if the 24-hour conversation window is currently open for the given phone.
